name: @lingcloud/ai-plan-manager
description: A powerful OpenClaw plugin for intelligent plan and task management with AI assistance

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Your AI Plan Manager API Key (get it from your account settings page)

apiBase.title: API Base URL (Optional)
apiBase.description: Backend API address. Leave empty to use the default cloud server. For local testing use: http://localhost:4000/api

notionEnabled.title: Enable Notion Sync (Optional)
notionEnabled.description: Whether to sync completed results to Notion when acknowledging a report

notionApiKey.title: Notion API Key (Optional)
notionApiKey.description: Notion Integration Token (starts with secret_ or ntn_)

notionParentPageId.title: Notion Parent Page ID (Optional)
notionParentPageId.description: Parent page ID that holds the daily result pages

feishuEnabled.title: Enable Feishu Doc Sync (Optional)
feishuEnabled.description: Whether to sync completed results to Feishu Docx when acknowledging a report

feishuAppId.title: Feishu App ID (Optional)
feishuAppId.description: Feishu/ Lark app_id for getting tenant_access_token

feishuAppSecret.title: Feishu App Secret (Optional)
feishuAppSecret.description: Feishu/ Lark app_secret for getting tenant_access_token

feishuFolderToken.title: Feishu Folder Token (Optional)
feishuFolderToken.description: If set, the created doc will be placed in this Feishu drive folder

features.title: Plan Management
features.description: Create, update, and manage plans with AI assistance

features.title: Task Tracking
features.description: Track task status and progress in real-time

features.title: Execution Reports
features.description: Generate comprehensive execution reports with insights

features.title: Smart Reminders
features.description: Get intelligent reminders for overdue and blocked tasks

features.title: Time Range Filtering
features.description: Filter plans by week, last week, month, or all time

tools.name: create_plan_draft
tools.description: Create plan drafts with AI assistance

tools.name: confirm_plan
tools.description: Confirm and save plans

tools.name: update_plan
tools.description: Modify plan information

tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List plans with filters

tools.name: get_plan_detail
tools.description: Get detailed plan information

tools.name: update_task_status
tools.description: Update task status

tools.name: generate_execution_report
tools.description: Generate execution reports

tools.name: get_plan_reminders
tools.description: Get plan reminders

tools.name: get_today_focus
tools.description: Get today's focus tasks

tools.name: test_connection
tools.description: Test API connection and diagnose token/config issues

tools.name: list_ai_staff
tools.description: List current user's AI staff members from user_my_staff collection

tools.name: clone_staff_agent
tools.description: Clone a staff member into an active Agent

tools.name: list_cloned_agents
tools.description: List all active cloned agents

tools.name: remove_clone
tools.description: Deactivate a cloned agent

tools.name: dispatch_task_to_agent
tools.description: Boss dispatches a task to a specific agent

tools.name: get_task_status
tools.description: Query the execution status of a dispatched task

tools.name: get_boss_reports
tools.description: Boss retrieves work reports submitted by agents

tools.name: acknowledge_report
tools.description: Boss acknowledges and closes a work report

tools.name: boss_morning_dispatch
tools.description: Morning auto-dispatch: assign today's tasks to agents

tools.name: clone_all_ai_staff
tools.description: Batch clone all AI staff members into active agents

steps: Build the plugin with npm run build
